path = "/mnt/data/file-R9if3akuaJCn3gDEZpVZaG-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    raw = f.read()
len(raw), raw[:5000]

import re, json

raw_path = "/mnt/data/file-R9if3akuaJCn3gDEZpVZaG-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(raw_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    raw = f.read()

print(len(raw))
print(repr(raw[:200]))

# Let's find hadith matn between quotes after 'قال رسول الله'
cue = "قال رسول الله"
idx_cue = raw.find(cue)
idx_cue, raw[idx_cue: idx_cue+60]

close_quote_idx = raw.find('"', open_quote_idx+1)
close_quote_idx, raw[close_quote_idx-10: close_quote_idx+10]

hadith_span = (open_quote_idx+1, close_quote_idx, raw[open_quote_idx+1: close_quote_idx])
hadith_span[0], hadith_span[1], hadith_span[2][:50], " ... ", hadith_span[2][-50:]

ayah_full = "وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ"
positions = []
start = 0
while True:
    idx = raw.find(ayah_full, start)
    if idx == -1:
        break
    positions.append(idx)
    start = idx + 1
len(positions), positions[:5]

with open(raw_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    raw = f.read()
print(len(raw))
print(repr(raw[930:]))

with open(raw_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    raw = f.read()
target_trunc = "وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَ"
trunc_start = raw.find(target_trunc)
trunc_start, raw[trunc_start: trunc_start+len(target_trunc)]

with open(raw_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    raw = f.read()

ayah_full = "وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ"
positions = []
start = 0
while True:
    idx = raw.find(ayah_full, start)
    if idx == -1:
        break
    positions.append(idx)
    start = idx + 1

# hadith
idx_cue = raw.find("قال رسول الله")
start_colon = raw.find(":", idx_cue)
open_quote_idx = raw.find('"', start_colon)
close_quote_idx = raw.find('"', open_quote_idx+1)
hadith_span = {
    "span_start": open_quote_idx+1,
    "span_end": close_quote_idx,
    "span_text": raw[open_quote_idx+1: close_quote_idx],
    "citation_type": "Hadeeth"
}

citations = [hadith_span]

# add each ayah full occurrence
for idx in positions:
    span = {
        "span_start": idx,
        "span_end": idx + len(ayah_full),
        "span_text": raw[idx: idx + len(ayah_full)],
        "citation_type": "Aya"
    }
    # quick sanity check: ensure substring matches exactly the ayah
    assert span["span_text"] == ayah_full
    citations.append(span)

# truncated ayah
target_trunc = "وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَ"
trunc_start_last = raw.rfind(target_trunc)
trunc_span = {
    "span_start": trunc_start_last,
    "span_end": len(raw),
    "span_text": raw[trunc_start_last: len(raw)],
    "citation_type": "Aya"
}
citations.append(trunc_span)

len(citations), citations[:3], citations[-1]
[(i, i+len(ayah_full)) for i in positions], len(ayah_full)

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":37,"span_end":269,"span_text":"إن الملائكة تنزل في هذه المساجد، فإذا رأوا أحداً من أمتي قد صلى ركعتين قبل أن يجلس، قالوا: اللهم اغفر له، اللهم ارحمه، اللهم ارض عنه، اللهم اقبل منه، اللهم اكتب له الأجر، اللهم ارفع درجته، اللهم اجعل له خيراً مما ترك، وخلفاً مما خلف","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":275,"span_end":345,"span_text":"وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":349,"span_end":419,"span_text":"وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":423,"span_end":493,"span_text":"وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":497,"span_end":567,"span_text":"وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":572,"span_end":642,"span_text":"وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":647,"span_end":717,"span_text":"وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":722,"span_end":792,"span_text":"وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":797,"span_end":867,"span_text":"وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":872,"span_end":942,"span_text":"وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":947,"span_end":1017,"span_text":"وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":1022,"span_end":1068,"span_text":"وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَ","citation_type":"Aya"}]}
